reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios

(Translated by Google)
Very clean bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaEllS2JnEAE

reviews.comment:
Precios altos como en toda la costa. La atención fue pésima. El trato incordial. No existen las palabras gracias! Se le ofrece algo más? Y el parabrisas sucio? Olvídate!!! Me atendieron dos playeros: ambos altaneros/arrogantes y muy mal predispuestos. No volvería nunca y menos estando de paseo!

(Translated by Google)
Prices are high, like everywhere else on the coast. The service was terrible. The staff was rude. They didn't even say "thank you!" "Can I get you anything else?" "And your windshield is dirty?" Forget it! I was served by two attendants: both arrogant and very unhelpful. I would never go back, especially not while on vacation!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbUlQZ2F3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean and the beach attendants were helpful... Everything else was average.

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena muy cordiales,los baños estaban limpios pero tienen poco surtidores y se forman filas interminables

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, very friendly. The restrooms were clean, but they have few water pumps and there are endless queues.

reviews.comment:
Empleados maleducados, mala predisposición, y discriminadores. El playero que nos tocó nos golpeó el capó de manera violenta y le devolvió la tarjeta de muy mala manera a mí marido.

(Translated by Google)
Rude, ill-disposed, and discriminatory employees. The beach attendant we were assigned to hit us violently on the hood and rudely handed my husband his card.
